hero.title: Precision, by
hero.subtitle: Depth
hero.description: Software Engineer with +4 years of experience specialized in full-stack development — building a seamless blend of performance, security and aesthetics.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: What I bring to a team
about.description: I don't just write code — I solve problems. With a strong foundation in both frontend and backend, I bring a product-oriented mindset to any project. I focus on building things that are fast, maintainable, and genuinely useful.
about.card1-description: I obsess about loading times and runtime efficiency. Every millisecond matters for giving your clients the best experience and staying competitive.
about.card2-description: From database design to pixel-perfect UIs. I bridge the gap between backend systems and frontend polish.
about.card3-description: Building systems that handle growth gracefully — through caching, project architectures, and thoughtful error handling.
about.card4-description: Maintainable code isn't optional. I write systems that future engineers will thank me for.

projects.title: Xalapa Móvil
desc: Built a mobile app for the Xalapa City Council to enhance citizen interaction'
Implemented features for submitting proposals, accessing services, and viewing local news
Centralized communication between residents and government entities
Improved accessibility and engagement with municipal services
projects.problem: Government needed a cross-platform mobile application to gather citizen proposals for city improvements and to expand the reach of website's services
projects.solution: Designed and developed a mobile application ready for running on Android and iOS
projects.key_decisions: Chose figma for wireframing screens and feature-based project architecture guaranteeing scalability over time

projects.title: Digital Signature
desc: Built a digital signature module for a clinical administrative system
Automated mass report generation for government compliance and validation
Reduced manual processing time and improved operational efficiency
Integrated doctor signatures directly into medical notes to streamline care workflows
Improved data integrity and ensured regulatory compliance
projects.problem: Managers were spending almost 1/3 of their working time manually signing and medical consultations were overlapping
projects.solution: Created a sub-module for HR system capturing employee's digital signature increasing productivity up to 90%
projects.key_decisions: Picked a symmetrical aes-256-cbc encrypt algorithm for keeping sensitive data safe and prevent stream manipulation

projects.title: Old Personal Website
desc: Built a personal portfolio platform to present my software engineering work
Created a cohesive experience combining technical and creative disciplines
Emphasized performance, responsive design, and modern UI/UX practices
projects.problem: There were no personal website for showcasing my professional path as software engineer, limitating growth and global presence
projects.solution: Developed a responsive website with optimized SEO and performance, based on trend designs
projects.key_decisions: Used Vite for a fast development experience due to CRA Webpack is deprecated and Framer Motion for smooth animations, prioritizing sections design.

projects.title: Human Resources System
desc: Engineered a microservice for an administrative clinical platform to manage HR operations
Implemented modules for attendance, incidents, permissions, vacations, and holidays
Designed a modular architecture with dedicated sub-modules for each HR function
Enhanced HR efficiency by centralizing and streamlining employee data management
projects.problem: Legacy HR system wasn't covering all current needs for incoming policies resulting in heavy workload
projects.solution: Gathered all requirements for making an intuitive system that boosted operational efficency
projects.key_decisions: Adopted a modular architecture to accommodate future policy changes and prioritized usability to ensure quick adoption

projects.title: Medical Congress Landing Page v2.0.0
desc: Led UI/UX redesign to enhance usability and modernize the interface
Implemented data management features
Created an admin dashboard for real-time access to participant information
projects.problem: v1 suffered from poor UI/UX, lack of automation, and absence of a structured database, resulting in inefficient manual processes and limited scalability
projects.solution: Re-architected the platform with a modernized UI/UX, integrated data management capabilities, and built an admin dashboard for real-time monitoring of participants
projects.key_decisions: Introduced a dedicated database for data consistency, focused on workflow automation to reduce manual overhead, and designed the system to support recurring large-scale events

projects.title: Tickets App
desc: Developed a real-time bank ticketing system using Socket.IO
Enabled bidirectional communication for live queue and ticket updates
Improved responsiveness and user interaction
projects.problem: Traditional ticketing and queue systems lack real-time updates, causing delays, poor synchronization, and inefficient user experience
projects.solution: Developed a real-time bank ticketing system using Socket.IO to enable bidirectional communication and instant queue updates
projects.key_decisions: WebSocket-based architecture for low-latency communication, designed event-driven interactions for real-time updates, and ensured synchronization between clients and server

projects.title: Resident Medical Evaluation System
desc: Engineered a microservice-based evaluation system for medical residents
Implemented modules for managing annual assessments and performance metrics
Streamlined evaluation workflows for the teaching department
Improved organization and accessibility of resident evaluation data
projects.problem: Manual and disconnected evaluation processes led to inefficiencies, lack of data consistency, and difficulty tracking resident performance over time
projects.solution: Design a centralized system to show metrics and streamline evaluation workflows improving workload efficiency by up to 65%
projects.key_decisions: Used a modular, scalable architecture to support recurring annual workflows with role based profile (admin, teacher, resident)

projects.title: Medical Congress Landing Page v1.0.0
desc: Built a web platform for hosting an annual medical congress since 2023
Developed attendee registration workflows
Provided internet presence through jornadasmedicascae.com domain
projects.problem: Assistants were required to register in person due to the absence of a digital platform, limiting attendance and reducing event reach
projects.solution: Designed a landing page for online registration increasing reach and growth by 72%
projects.key_decisions: Used React as UI Library for mantaining uniformity against hospital's systems along an enterprise Google Workspace solution for professional email presence and AWS hosting

projects.title: Heroes App
desc: Built a React-based web application with client-side state management using Context API and reducers
Implemented authentication flow with protected public/private routes
Leveraged localStorage for persistence of user session, theme (dark mode), and navigation state
Developed dynamic search functionality with real-time input handling and keyboard events
projects.problem: Managing client-side state, persistence, and route protection without a backend required a structured frontend architecture
projects.solution: Developed a React-based web app using Context API and reducers for state management, with localStorage to persist user data such as login status, theme, and navigation history

projects.title: Currency Converter Challenge
desc: Developed a currency converter application as part of the Oracle Next Education Program
Integrated an external Exchange Rate API to fetch real-time currency values
Built a graphical user interface using Java Swing for an intuitive user experience
Implemented dynamic currency conversion based on user input and API data
projects.problem: Users needed a simple way to access up-to-date currency exchange rates without manually searching or calculating values
projects.solution: Developed a desktop application that integrates with an Exchange Rate API to fetch real-time currency data and perform dynamic conversions
projects.key_decisions: Implemented API integration from scratch to handle real-time data retrieval, used Java Swing for a lightweight desktop interface, and designed input-driven conversion logic for immediate user feedback

projects.title: Cipher Challenge
desc: Built a web app for text encryption and decryption as part of the Oracle Next Education Program
Implemented custom encoding/decoding algorithms for string manipulation
Designed a simple and intuitive UI for user interaction
Handled input validation and real-time text processing
projects.problem: Project needed a simple way to encode and decode text based on predefined rules without performing manual transformations
projects.solution: Developed a web application that implements text encryption and decryption using custom encoding/decoding algorithms with real-time processing
projects.key_decisions: Implemented custom string manipulation logic to meet specific encoding rules, prioritized a trend UI for usability, and added real-time input handling for immediate feedback

projects.title: MP3 Glass Player
desc: Built a custom MP3 web player with a glassmorphism design system
Implemented interactive audio controls and dynamic UI states
Designed a responsive and visually engaging interface with modern UI trends
Enhanced user experience through smooth interactions and clean visual hierarchy
projects.problem: Traditional web audio players often lack modern UI design and engaging user experience
projects.solution: Designed and developed an MP3 web player with a clean glassmorphism-inspired interface, focusing on aesthetics and usability
projects.key_decisions: Adopted a glassmorphism design system for a modern look and feel, prioritized intuitive playback controls, and ensured smooth user interaction through responsive UI design

projects.title: Lotus Discord Bot
desc: Built a Discord music bot using Node.js with support for YouTube and Spotify integration
Implemented real-time command handling and audio streaming within Discord voice channels
Customized the bot experience with a Warframe-based game interface and responses
projects.problem: Existing solutions for music playback in Discord were limited or lacked flexibility across multiple streaming platforms
projects.solution: Built a Node.js Discord bot for YouTube and Spotify playback
projects.key_decisions: API integrations for multiple audio sources, designed a command-driven interface for usability, and structured real-time interaction within Discord voice channels

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technical depth
skills.description: Technologies I've worked with, grouped by domain. I value depth over breadth — I'd generally rather master a few tools than skim many but, at the same time, I strive to stay current with emerging technologies.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's build something great
contact.description: I'm open to full-time roles, contract work, and interesting collaborations. Working remotely worldwide. If you're looking for an engineer who cares about quality.
